meta.title: Dharma-Parayan Ganatantrik Parishad - Not Party, We Want Ministers
meta.description: Rajya-Manthan: 100-Day Voter Education Campaign for West Bengal Assembly Elections 2026

hero.subtitle: PRAYOG: A 100-Day Democratic Innovation
hero.description: Can citizens of West Bengal prove that minister-centric voting creates better governance? Join the sacred experiment that could transform India's democracy.

prayog.title: The Prayog
prayog.subtitle: A Sacred Experiment in Democracy
prayog.meaning: Prayog (प्रयोग/প্রয়োগ) means 'experiment' or 'application' - the practical test of an idea
prayog.description: For the first time in Indian democratic history, we're testing a revolutionary hypothesis: What if voters evaluated candidates as potential ministers, not as party representatives?
prayog.hypothesisText: When voters understand that their MLA could become one of 54 ministers who run the state, they will demand competence and character, not just party loyalty.
prayog.experimentText: 100 days of mass education across West Bengal, teaching citizens how governance actually works and empowering them to evaluate candidates as future ministers.

manthan.name: Manthan
manthan.subtitle: The Churning
manthan.description: Deep discussions and debates about governance, ministries, and candidate evaluation. Like the mythological churning of the ocean, this brings hidden truths to surface.

prayogshala.name: Prayogshala
prayogshala.subtitle: The Laboratory
prayogshala.description: Constituency-level experiments where citizens practice evaluating candidates using ministry scorecards and competency frameworks.

parishad.name: Parishad
parishad.subtitle: The Council
parishad.description: Networks of informed citizens who commit to minister-centric voting and help spread awareness in their communities.

ministerCandidate.title: Become a Minister-Candidate
ministerCandidate.subtitle: The first step to better governance
ministerCandidate.description: Don't just vote - step up to be evaluated. If you believe you have the competence and character to serve as a minister, let your constituency know.
ministerCandidate.reason1: Be evaluated on merit, not party ticket
ministerCandidate.reason2: Build direct connection with informed voters
ministerCandidate.reason4: Be part of the democratic innovation
ministerCandidate.whyMinisterPlaceholder: Why do you want to be a minister? What ministry interests you?
ministerCandidate.disclaimer: This is not a political party. We help citizens evaluate candidates across all parties.

dashboard.title: The 12 Minister Goal
dashboard.subtitle: Our sacred mission for Bengal 2026
dashboard.description: If this prayog succeeds, West Bengal will elect at least 12 ministers based on competence and character rather than just party loyalty.

parishad.title: Join the Parishad
parishad.subtitle: The Council of Informed Citizens
parishad.description: The Parishad is a network of citizens who commit to minister-centric voting and actively spread awareness in their communities.
parishad.pledgeText: I pledge to evaluate all candidates as potential ministers, judge them on competence and character, and help my community understand how governance truly works.

benefits.title: As a Parishad Member
benefits.benefit1: Access exclusive Manthan sessions with governance experts
benefits.benefit3: Connect with other informed voters in your area
benefits.benefit4: Be part of historical democratic change

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.point1: Teach voters about the actual governance structure: 294 MLAs elect a Council of Ministers who RUN the state
mission.point2: Explain each ministry's role, responsibilities, budget allocations, and performance metrics
mission.point3: Enable voters to evaluate candidates based on competence and character, not just party symbols

stats.title: The Reality
stats.stat1Label: Ministers who control your daily life

ministries.title: Know Your Ministries
ministries.subtitle: The Council of Ministers controls everything from your child's education to the roads you travel. Learn what each ministry does.
ministries.topMinistries: Top 10 Ministries That Impact Your Daily Life

health.name: Health & Family Welfare
health.description: Hospitals, doctors, medicines, ambulances, vaccination programs

education.name: School Education
education.description: Schools, teachers, midday meals, exams, educational infrastructure

home.name: Home & Hill Affairs
home.description: Police, law & order, women's safety, crime prevention

panchayat.name: Panchayat & Rural Development
panchayat.description: MGNREGA, rural schemes, local governance, village development

urban.name: Urban Development
urban.description: Municipal services, water, sanitation, urban planning

agriculture.name: Agriculture
agriculture.description: Farmers, MSP, seeds, fertilizers, crop insurance

food.name: Food & Supplies
food.description: Ration, PDS, fair price shops, food security

about.title: About the Parishad
about.subtitle: Dharma-Parayan Ganatantrik Parishad
about.missionText: Transform West Bengal's political culture from party-centric voting to minister-centric evaluation, empowering citizens to elect a competent Council of Ministers who will govern with dharma (righteousness).
about.founderBio: Mass Education & Culture Change Pioneer with 30+ years of proven expertise in using media and technology for large-scale behavior change. Creator of the OmniDEL Framework and pioneer in AI for Education.
about.cofounderBio: Deep experience in leveraging AI for scalable education delivery. Technology strategist for mass education programs.
about.track1: Safe Drive Save Life Movement - Transformed road safety culture in Kolkata
about.track2: Mass Music Education Programs - Scaled to thousands across Bengal
about.track3: IIT Kharagpur Durga Puja 2025 - One of the largest Durga Pujas
about.track4: Durga Puja 2025 Digital Campaign - 3 million+ views on social media

join.title: Join the Movement
join.subtitle: Be part of the historic AI-powered Mass Education Campaign
join.volunteerDesc: Help spread voter awareness in your constituency. Share content, organize discussions, educate your community.
join.amplifierDesc: Commit to sharing our daily content to 5+ WhatsApp groups. Just 5 minutes a day can reach thousands.

footer.tagline: Information for you. Decision is yours.
footer.disclaimer: Dharma-Parayan Ganatantrik Parishad is not affiliated with any political party or candidate. We only provide information - the decision is yours.
footer.copyright: 2026 Dharma-Parayan Ganatantrik Parishad. An initiative of KarmYog for 21st Century.

ministerSelection.title: Minister Selection
ministerSelection.subtitle: The Prayogshala - Sacred Electoral Experiment
ministerSelection.description: This is not about choosing parties. It's about selecting who will BE your minister. Evaluate candidates based on competence and character for specific ministerial roles.
ministerSelection.step1: Learn what each of the 44 ministries does and how they affect your daily life
ministerSelection.step2: Assess if your constituency's candidates have the competence to be ministers
ministerSelection.step3: Vote for the candidate best suited to serve as a minister, regardless of party
ministerSelection.paradigmShift: Traditional voting asks: Which party do I support? Minister Selection asks: Which candidate can govern my state?
ministerSelection.callToActionDesc: If you believe you have the competence and character to serve as a minister, register your interest and let citizens evaluate you.

donate.heroSubtitle: Help educate 1.5 crore voters in West Bengal
donate.heroDescription: Join the historic AI-powered mass education campaign. Your contribution directly funds voter awareness - teaching citizens how democracy actually works, not who to vote for.
donate.whatIsSubtitle: Dharma-Parayan Ganatantrik Parishad is India's first AI-powered civic education campaign, transforming how voters understand democracy through Rajya-Manthan.
donate.coreExplanation: We teach voters a revolutionary truth: Parties don't run hospitals or build roads — Ministers do. A state is run by its Council of Ministers, not by party symbols. When you vote, you're actually selecting who will BE your minister. This changes everything about how you should evaluate candidates.
donate.keyPoint1: 44 Ministers control your daily life - from healthcare to roads to education. Your MLA could become one of them.
donate.keyPoint2: Ask: Is this candidate capable of being a minister? Do they have the competence and character to govern?
donate.keyPoint3: When voters demand ministerial quality, parties are forced to field better candidates. Democracy improves.
donate.whyMinistersSubtitle: Understanding the difference between voting for parties and evaluating ministers
donate.wrongWayDesc: Voters look at party symbols, listen to rallies, vote based on loyalty or anger. They don't know what their MLA will actually DO if elected. Result: Incompetent people become ministers.
donate.rightWayDesc: Voters learn what each ministry does, understand how governance works, evaluate if their candidate could be a competent minister. Result: Better ministers, better governance.
donate.paradigmQuote: Parties don't run hospitals or build roads — Ministers do. So evaluate ministers, not party symbols.
donate.aiAdvantageSubtitle: For the first time, technology makes mass voter education affordable
donate.chooseTierSubtitle: Every rupee educates voters. Every donation strengthens democracy.
donate.scanInstructions: Scan with any UPI app (GPay, PhonePe, Paytm, BHIM) to donate instantly
donate.taxBenefitDesc: All donations are eligible for tax deduction under Section 80G
donate.sponsorSubtitle: For organizations seeking larger impact. Your brand associated with democratic empowerment, not politics.

donate.aboutSubtitle: A non-profit initiative dedicated to strengthening Indian democracy through civic education
donate.founderBio: Mass Education & Culture Change Pioneer with 30+ years of proven expertise in using media and technology for large-scale behavior change. Creator of the OmniDEL Framework and pioneer in AI for Education.
donate.track1: Safe Drive Save Life Movement - Transformed road safety culture in Kolkata
donate.track2: Mass Music Education Programs - Scaled to thousands across Bengal
donate.track3: IIT Kharagpur Durga Puja 2025 - One of the largest Durga Pujas
donate.track4: Durga Puja 2025 Digital Campaign - 3 million+ views on social media
donate.orgDescription: KarmYog for 21st Century Foundation is a registered non-profit dedicated to applying timeless principles of dharma and karma to contemporary challenges. We believe good governance starts with educated citizens.

q1.q: Is the Parishad affiliated with any political party?
q1.a: Absolutely not. Dharma-Parayan Ganatantrik Parishad is strictly non-partisan. We educate voters about how democracy works, not who to vote for. We receive no funding from any political party and maintain complete independence.

q2.q: How will my donation be used?
q2.a: Every rupee is tracked publicly. Approximately: 60% on content creation (AI tools, video production), 25% on distribution (WhatsApp API, social ads), 10% on operations, 5% on reporting and transparency.

q3.a: Yes! KarmYog for 21st Century Foundation has 80G certification. You'll receive an official receipt for tax purposes within 7 working days.

q4.a: We believe in proving concepts before scaling. Bengal 2026 is our pilot. Success here creates the blueprint for India's 2029 general elections and beyond.

q5.q: What if the funding goal isn't met?
q5.a: We work in phases. Even partial funding allows partial reach. All funds raised will be deployed transparently with public dashboards showing exact utilization.

q6.a: Yes! Share this campaign, volunteer your time, or offer skills (video editing, content writing, technology). Email us at volunteer@dpgp.in

donate.finalCtaTitle: Every Voter Matters. Every Rupee Counts.
donate.finalCtaSubtitle: Join thousands of Indians strengthening democracy through education. Your support today shapes Bengal's governance tomorrow.
donate.everyRupee: 100% of donations go to voter education. Transparent accounting. Public dashboards.
